author: gb9t
content: Iter 142 result: net/openvswitch/conntrack.md (OVS conntrack action - conntrack.c ~2028 lines; OVS_ACTION_ATTR_CT integrates nf_conntrack with OVS pipeline + OVS_CT_ATTR_COMMIT/ZONE/MARK/LABELS/HELPER/NAT/FORCE_COMMIT/EVENTMASK/TIMEOUT attrs + ovs_ct_execute lookup-or-commit + ovs_ct_nat DNAT/SNAT setup_info + ovs_ct_helper attach FTP/SIP/TFTP/IRC + ovs_ct_update_key sets sw_flow_key.ct_state {NEW, ESTABLISHED, RELATED, REPLY_DIR, INVALID, TRACKED, SRC_NAT, DST_NAT} OVS_CS_F_* flags + per-zone segregation + per-fragment reassembly + OVS_ACTION_ATTR_CT_CLEAR + stateful-firewall security-groups + service-mesh L4 LB + NAT overlays) + mm/bootmem.md (Boot-time memblock allocator - mm/memblock.c ~2908 lines; per-system Memblock with memory + reserved + physmem MemblockType arrays + MemblockRegion {base, size, flags, nid} sorted-by-base auto-merged + memblock_add from e820/DT parse + memblock_reserve carves kernel/initrd/fdt + memblock_alloc/_node/_low/_phys/_try_nid → reserve + phys_to_virt + per-arch boot fill + __free_pages_memory at mem_init hands free-ranges to buddy + ZONE_MOVABLE for MEMBLOCK_HOTPLUG + MEMBLOCK_MIRROR for RAS + memtest pattern-test + CONFIG_ARCH_KEEP_MEMBLOCK post-boot survival + per-NUMA-node assignment from ACPI SRAT/DT + INIT_MEMBLOCK_REGIONS 128 default capacity). 234 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/sched/sch-ets.md or net/9p next + mm/mm-debug.md.
